easy.questionText: What is the time complexity of a Linear Search in an array of size n?

medium.questionText: Which sorting algorithm has a worst-case time complexity of O(n^2)?

hard.questionText: What is the optimal substructure property in Dynamic Programming?
options: The problem can be solved by breaking it into overlapping subproblems
An optimal solution to the problem contains optimal solutions to subproblems
The problem must be solved recursively
The problem must have a greedy choice property
